subcodes.title: Words to Horace Holley, spoken on 1913-05-11
subcodes.first_line: I was thinking that during the days of Christ not one word was written about him. We have at the present time four Gospels, two of these were written 60 years after Christ
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @review of publications, @rational arguments, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering; rejection of Christ
